steps.title: Identify the scaling problem
steps.content: The most decisive clue is that conventional fabrication loses up to 80% of solution, explicitly “increasing the cost of manufacturing at scale.”

steps.title: Match the signal to the answer
steps.content:
Choice A correctly concludes that conventional is less suitable for large-volume manufacturing than spray coating. Choices B, C, and D either reference different architectures (B), mischaracterize spray coating as “established” (C), or claim unsupported effects on cell effectiveness (D).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
